LinkedIn Suite

Quillnova

AI LinkedIn Post Generator — 6 Styles, 10 Languages

Generate viral LinkedIn posts in seconds. Choose from 6 writing styles, 6 tones, and 10 languages. Generate hooks, hashtags, and preview exactly how your post will look on LinkedIn.

Features

6 writing styles: Thought Leader, Story, How-To, Hot Take, Data-Driven, Personal Brand

Support for 10 languages with native fluency

Hook generator with 10 attention-grabbing openers

Hashtag engine with 15 relevant tags per topic

LinkedIn preview mockup to see how posts look

8 pre-built templates for quick starts
